message:
chore(beads): sync issue store state — 8 issues touched during reality-check pass

Routine br sync flush capturing the new backlog items opened while the
reality-check bridge plan (NEXT_STEPS_PLAN.md, queued separately) was
being drafted. A handful of issues also had status / updated_at ticks.
No source changes — just keeping the on-disk JSONL aligned with the
sqlite store so future `br ready` / `bv triage` calls see the same
state as the DB.
